title: A Day at the Beach
summary: A woman describes a fun day at the beach with her family during summer.
body: Last summer, my family went to the beach for a day. We woke up early and packed our bags. We put towels, sunscreen, and drinks in the bag. The beach was about one hour from our house. When we arrived, the sand was white and the sea was blue. The weather was sunny and warm. My children ran to the water right away. They played in the waves and laughed a lot. I put a big umbrella in the sand. I sat under the umbrella to stay cool. My husband built a sandcastle with the children. It was very tall and had shells on top. We ate lunch on the sand. We had sandwiches, fruit, and cold water. After lunch, I swam in the sea. The water was cool and clear. In the afternoon, we walked along the beach. We found pretty shells and smooth stones. The children collected them in a small bag. The sun began to set at about six o'clock. The sky turned orange and pink. We took photos of the sunset. Then we drove home tired but very happy.

annotations.exampleEn: They packed their bags the night before the trip.
She put sunscreen on the children before they went outside.
The children jumped in the waves and laughed.
We sat under a large beach umbrella to stay cool.
The children spent an hour building a sandcastle.
She collected beautiful shells along the beach.
They found smooth stones near the water's edge.
The sun began to set, turning the sky golden.
They watched the beautiful sunset from the beach.
He collected stamps as a hobby.
As soon as they arrived, the children ran right away.
Drink plenty of water to stay cool in hot weather.

grammarNotes.title: Simple past for narrative
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Simple past dùng để kể lại câu chuyện hoặc sự kiện đã xảy ra trong quá khứ: 'We woke up early.' / 'The children ran to the water.' / 'We took photos of the sunset.' Chú ý các động từ bất quy tắc: go → went, wake → woke, run → ran.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: The simple past is used to narrate past events: 'We woke up early.' / 'The children ran to the water.' / 'We took photos of the sunset.' Note irregular forms: go → went, wake → woke, run → ran.

grammarNotes.title: Adjectives to describe scenes
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Tính từ mô tả vẻ ngoài của sự vật: 'The sand was white.' / 'The sea was blue.' / 'The water was cool and clear.' Tính từ đứng sau động từ 'be' để mô tả chủ ngữ.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Adjectives describe the appearance of things: 'The sand was white.' / 'The sea was blue.' / 'The water was cool and clear.' Adjectives follow the verb 'be' to describe the subject.

translationVi: Mùa hè năm ngoái, gia đình tôi đến bãi biển chơi một ngày. Chúng tôi thức dậy sớm và đóng gói túi. Chúng tôi cho khăn tắm, kem chống nắng và đồ uống vào túi. Bãi biển cách nhà chúng tôi khoảng một giờ. Khi đến nơi, cát màu trắng và biển màu xanh. Thời tiết nắng và ấm. Các con tôi chạy ngay xuống nước. Chúng chơi sóng và cười rất nhiều. Tôi cắm một chiếc ô lớn trên cát. Tôi ngồi dưới ô để giữ mát. Chồng tôi xây lâu đài cát cùng các con. Lâu đài rất cao và có vỏ sò trên đỉnh. Chúng tôi ăn trưa trên cát. Chúng tôi có bánh mì kẹp, trái cây và nước lạnh. Sau bữa trưa, tôi bơi ở biển. Nước mát và trong vắt. Buổi chiều, chúng tôi đi dọc bãi biển. Chúng tôi tìm thấy những vỏ sò đẹp và đá cuội nhẵn. Các con nhặt chúng vào một túi nhỏ. Mặt trời bắt đầu lặn vào khoảng sáu giờ. Bầu trời chuyển sang màu cam và hồng. Chúng tôi chụp ảnh hoàng hôn. Sau đó chúng tôi lái xe về nhà mệt mỏi nhưng rất vui.

questions.prompt: When did the family go to the beach?
questions.explanation: 'Last summer, my family went to the beach for a day.'

questions.prompt: What did they put in their bag?
questions.explanation: 'We put towels, sunscreen, and drinks in the bag.'

questions.prompt: How far was the beach from their house?
questions.explanation: 'The beach was about one hour from our house.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the distance.

questions.prompt: What did the children do first at the beach?
questions.explanation: 'My children ran to the water right away.'
questions.hint: Find what the children did when they arrived.

questions.prompt: Why did the narrator sit under an umbrella?
questions.explanation: 'I sat under the umbrella to stay cool.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about the umbrella.

questions.explanation: 'My husband built a sandcastle with the children.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about what the husband did.

questions.prompt: What was on top of the sandcastle?
questions.explanation: 'It was very tall and had shells on top.'
questions.hint: Find the description of the sandcastle.

questions.prompt: What did the family eat for lunch?
questions.explanation: 'We had sandwiches, fruit, and cold water.'

questions.prompt: What did the narrator do after lunch?
questions.explanation: 'After lunch, I swam in the sea.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence after the lunch description.

questions.prompt: What did the children collect on the beach?
questions.explanation: 'We found pretty shells and smooth stones.'
questions.hint: Find the sentence about collecting things.

questions.prompt: What colours did the sky turn at sunset?
How did the family feel when they drove home?
questions.explanation: 'Then we drove home tired but very happy.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: The family had a wonderful day at the beach. What do you think makes a day trip special? What would you pack if you went to the beach?
